title: Greek Mozzarella Pizza
description: A classic Greek-inspired pizza topped with mozzarella cheese and a sprinkle of greek seasoning.
instructions: Roll out the pizza dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Brush the dough with buttery olive oil.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet.
Sprinkle the mozzarella cheese evenly over the dough.
Sprinkle the Greek seasoning over the cheese.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
